title: Local AI Agents Masterclass (Gemma 4 + OpenCode + Odysseus tutorial)
summary: A tutorial on running local AI agents for workspace automation and code generation. Covers installing Odysseus (a workspace agent) and OpenCode (a build agent) on personal hardware, running Gemma 4 locally via Ollama with 7.4 GB RAM, and using frontier models like Claude to improve local model execution.
writeup: The video walks through running AI agents locally for workspace automation and code generation, installing Odysseus as a workspace agent and OpenCode as a build agent on personal hardware. It runs Gemma 4 locally through Ollama at 7.4 GB RAM, demonstrating that agentic workflows can operate without cloud inference. The notable wrinkle: frontier models like Claude serve as teacher models to improve the local model's execution, combining local inference with selective use of stronger remote models.
